title: xsd:boolean returned as xsd:integer
description:
Hi,
When using virtuoso on Ubuntu linux 14.04 64Bit, and building virtuoso from source using commit 57052e5, it have the problem that I input a value in an rdf file using the xsd:boolean datatype
<ns5:isIndirect rdf:datatype="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#boolean">false</ns5:isIndirect>

and I get it back as an xsd:integer
<ns5:isIndirect rdf:datatype="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#integer">0</ns5:isIndirect>

I am using the quad store upload functionality with an xml/rdf file in the conductor.
Could you have a look?
Thanks!
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_boolean (id INT PRIMARY KEY, isIndirect BOOLEAN NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_boolean (id, isIndirect) VALUES (1, TRUE);
INSERT INTO test_boolean (id, isIndirect) VALUES (2, FALSE);
SELECT id, isIndirect, typeof(isIndirect) AS datatype FROM test_boolean;
SELECT id FROM test_boolean WHERE isIndirect IS NULL;
